title: GLights
description: connects the game with Logitech’s Keyboard + Mouse RGB ecosystem, syncing in-game events with real-time lighting effects through Logitech G Hub for a fully immersive experience.
body:
![Glights-Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98d81cf76002417f485fc9be6b24cc8b94d86534.png)

Is a client-side mod that connects Minecraft with Logitech’s RGB Lightsync ecosystem. Reacting dynamically to in-game events, it provides a fully immersive experience through synchronized RGB lighting.

---

**Features**

*Dynamic Lighting Sync*
* Real-Time Reactions – Lights change instantly based on in-game triggers (health, damage, dimension).

---

**Dependencies:**
* Logitech G Hub (required) – for RGB device control
* Fabric API (required)
* Mod Menu (optional) – for in-game config access
* Cloth Config (optional) – for in-game config access
